intentSynonyms: get store time slots in starbucks
look up store time slots in starbucks
fetch a single store time slots in starbucks
view one specific store time slots in starbucks
get available pickup time slots in starbucks
description: Get available pickup time slots for a specific Starbucks store. Use this to check when mobile orders can be picked up. Returns empty if the store does not support scheduled ordering or is closed.
